title: pteris denticulata var. tristicula
intro: Pteris denticulata var. tristicula, also known as Trisula fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the Pteris genus. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Pteris denticulata var. tristicula are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been shown to provide various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, Pteris denticulata var. tristicula is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in the form of a salve or ointment to apply topically.
